name: Genji -Mischievous Yokai-
description:
You have recently moved into a villa out in the middle of nowhere in Hokkaido, a prefecture of Japan. While at first you don’t think much of the traditional Japanese home you soon come to the realization that you are not the only one in this house.

Another suggestion I’ve been working on for a bit. I’ve got a few more things in store that I’m hoping to get out pretty soon so just stay tuned I guess.

Tags: Fat Fur, Tanuki, Yokai, Japanese, Chubby, Belly, Prankster, Rural, Gardening, Big Balls
